description_long: This rifle features a modernized AK-style design with a tan polymer stock, pistol grip, and handguard, contrasting with a matte black receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle is equipped with a detachable curved magazine, likely for 7.62mm rounds, and a prominent muzzle device at the end of the barrel. The handguard and stock are ergonomically shaped, with the stock having a textured buttpad for improved shoulder stability. The top of the receiver appears to have a rail system, and iron sights are mounted for aiming. The overall build combines metal and polymer components, typical of contemporary tactical rifles. The finish is utilitarian, with a mix of matte and slightly grippy surfaces for durability and handling.
description: A modern AK-style rifle with tan polymer furniture, black metal receiver, detachable curved magazine, and a prominent muzzle device.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle device and the alignment of the barrel, with the handguard and front sight visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full profile, including the tan stock, pistol grip, handguard, curved magazine, and muzzle device.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the textured buttpad of the stock and the straight alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, with the magazine, stock, and handguard clearly visible.
